checklist.description: Repository is implemented as an exported factory function (e.g. `export function createNotificationsRepository(db)`) rather than a class
checklist.name: Factory function export

checklist.description: A type alias is exported using `ReturnType<typeof createNotificationsRepository>` (or equivalent naming pattern)
checklist.name: ReturnType alias

checklist.description: The `create` / insert method calls `getExecutor(db)` instead of using `db` directly
checklist.name: getExecutor for insert

checklist.description: The update method (marking as read) calls `getExecutor(db)` instead of using `db` directly
checklist.name: getExecutor for update

checklist.description: The delete method calls `getExecutor(db)` instead of using `db` directly
checklist.name: getExecutor for delete

checklist.description: None of the write methods (insert/update/delete) use the raw `db` parameter directly — only `getExecutor(db)` is used for mutations
checklist.name: No raw db for writes

checklist.description: Read/query methods (findById, list) do NOT include the `embedding` column in their SELECT — the embedding column is explicitly excluded
checklist.name: Embedding column excluded

checklist.description: The embedding exclusion uses `getTableColumns()` destructuring to build a column selection (rather than manually listing every column)
checklist.name: Column exclusion technique

checklist.description: The repository does NOT use a class with `new`, `this`, or class-based methods anywhere
checklist.name: No class-based pattern

checklist.description: Methods return proper typed values: create returns `Notification`, findById returns `Notification | null`, list returns `Notification[]`
checklist.name: Proper return types

context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements a Drizzle repository following MoltNet conventions: factory functions (not classes), use of getExecutor for all writes to pick up DBOS transaction context, and exclusion of the expensive embedding column from read queries.
